recommendations.title: 2 Hearts
recommendations.overview: When illness strikes two people who are polar opposites, life and death bring them together in surprising ways.

recommendations.title: Nous York
recommendations.overview: Thirty-somethings Michaël, Nabil and Sylvain head to New York to surprise their friend Samia on her birthday, secretly arranged with the help of another friend, Gabrielle. The two women had moved to NYC two years previously to try their luck. Samia s

recommendations.title: Half Sister, Full Love
recommendations.overview: Mourning his brother's recent death, Pierrick accepts his best friend Tessa's invitation to stay in her family home — at last, a week alone. But when her gets there, he finds the house already occupied by Tessa's sister Marie.

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: Tonight You're Sleeping with Me
recommendations.overview: Stuck in a passionless marriage, a journalist must choose between her distant but loving husband and a younger ex-boyfriend who has reentered her life

recommendations.title: The One I Love
recommendations.overview: Ethan and Sophie are a married couple on the brink of separation when, at the urging of their therapist, they decide to salvage their relationship by escaping to a beautiful vacation house for the weekend.

recommendations.title: Divorce French Style

recommendations.title: Nobody's Fool
